rqs: What are the precision, recall, and latency outcomes of automated data extraction methods compared to manual extraction in digital libraries?
Which data extraction techniques (e.g., web scraping, ETL pipelines, NLP parsers) achieve the highest F1-score for software engineers and data scientists in enterprise systems?
In which contexts (benchmark datasets, open source repositories, industry case studies) do rule‑based extraction methods outperform heuristic methods in accuracy?
base_query: ("Software Engineers" OR "Data Scientists" OR "Researchers" OR "Business Analysts" OR "System Administrators" OR "researcher") AND ("Web Scraping" OR "ETL Pipelines" OR "Information Extraction" OR "NLP Parsers" OR "Data Mining") AND ("Manual Extraction" OR "Rule Based Extraction" OR "Template Matching" OR "Heuristic Methods") AND ("Precision" OR "Recall" OR "f1-score" OR "Accuracy" OR "Latency") AND ("Digital Libraries" OR "Open Source Repositories" OR "Enterprise Systems" OR "Benchmark Datasets" OR "Industry Case Studies")
arxiv_query: (all:"Software Engineers" OR all:"Data Scientists" OR all:"Researchers" OR all:"Business Analysts" OR all:"System Administrators" OR all:"researcher") AND (all:"Web Scraping" OR all:"ETL Pipelines" OR all:"Information Extraction" OR all:"NLP Parsers" OR all:"Data Mining") AND (all:"Manual Extraction" OR all:"Rule Based Extraction" OR all:"Template Matching" OR all:"Heuristic Methods") AND (all:"Precision" OR all:"Recall" OR all:"f1-score" OR all:"Accuracy" OR all:"Latency") AND (all:"Digital Libraries" OR all:"Open Source Repositories" OR all:"Enterprise Systems" OR all:"Benchmark Datasets" OR all:"Industry Case Studies")

include: arXiv CS categories (cs.DL, cs.IR, cs.SE, cs.LG)
arXiv preprints with CS subject tags
Cited or published in top CS venues

questions.text: Is the automated data extraction method described in enough detail to replicate?
Are evaluation metrics (precision, recall, F1-score, latency) reported for each method?
Is the study context (e.g., digital library, enterprise system) clearly specified?
Does the paper compare the automated approach against a manual or baseline extraction method?
Is the source code, tool, or configuration used for extraction made publicly available?

fields.name: Venue
fields.help: Conference, journal, workshop, or other outlet

fields.name: Extraction Technique
fields.help: Primary automated or manual method evaluated

fields.name: Evaluation Context
fields.help: Domain or setting where the technique was applied

fields.name: Metrics Reported
fields.help: Performance measures presented in the study

fields.name: Metric Values
fields.help: Numeric values for each reported metric (e.g., Precision=0.92, Latency=120 ms)

fields.name: Process Phase
fields.help: Stages of the data extraction pipeline addressed

fields.name: Gaps / Challenges
fields.help: Limitations, open issues, or future work highlighted by the authors
